blockingIssues.description: Commit-isolated verification failed: src/runtime/session.ts re-exports cache helper symbols that are not exported by src/runtime/session-workspace.ts, producing TS2305 failures and a runtime ReferenceError in bundle sanity.
m5-read-cache-mkdir contract remains unresolved in committed code: tests/runtime/workspace-cache.test.ts still asserts mkdir call count equals 30 instead of enforcing the required <= 2 threshold.

m5-bundle-optimization mock-peer validation remains unresolved in committed code: scripts/cross-area/bundle-sanity.mjs imports repo dist/index.js directly without resolver wiring that guarantees use of the created @opencode-ai/plugin shim.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require verification evidence to be captured against the committed SHA in an isolated clean state (or equivalent) before declaring feature completion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature m5-scrutiny-fixes reported completion while post-commit working tree remained dirty and commit 415b90e fails isolated typecheck/runtime smoke.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen enforcement language that implementation features must not leave required functional changes uncommitted when handing off completion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix commit omits required session-workspace helper exports while dependent imports were committed, allowing an incomplete and broken isolated commit to pass local non-isolated verification.
